info.title: TFG DAM API
info.description: An application that lets you create character builds for your favourite games.

MessageResponse.description: An object that returns a simple message indicating the result of an operation.

ErrorResponse.description: An object representing an API error, including a general message and details for specific fields if applicable.

PrivateProfileSummary.description: A private user profile summary, including sensitive information such as email and role.

PublicProfileSummary.description: A public user profile summary, visible to other users without sensitive information.

BuildSummary.description: A full summary of a game build, including game information, owners, description, version, and game-specific dynamic data.

templateData.description: Dynamic JSON structure depending on the game

example.name: Test Build Elden Ring 3
example.description: A Test description for the build

PartialBuildSummary.description: A partial summary of a game build, containing basic information without the game-specific dynamic data.

example.name: Test Build Elden Ring 3
example.description: A Test description for the build

BuildAssetSummary.description: A list of assets associated with a build, including identifier, slot category, and slot name.

BuildPermissionSummary.description: A list of editor permissions for a build.

GameSummary.description: A summary of a game, including its ID, name, description, genres, cover and icon URLs.

example.name: Elden Ring
example.description: Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between.

AssetSummary.description: A summary of a game asset, including identifiers, names, type, category, description, and game-specific dynamic data.

data.description: Dynamic JSON structure depending on the game

example.name: Claymore
example.description: A large sword with a long, straight blade.
example.shortDescription: A large sword with a long, straight blade.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized — access token missing or invalid

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed in the window

example.message: Too many attempts, please try again later

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User profile and account management endpoints

post.description: Creates a new user account. Fails if username or email already exists.

409.description: Conflict — username or email already exists

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password. On success, sets HttpOnly cookies for the access and refresh tokens.

200.description: User logged in successfully. Tokens set in HttpOnly cookies.

Set-Cookie.description: Sets access_token (15 min, SameSite=Lax) and refresh_token (configurable days, SameSite=Strict) as HttpOnly cookies.

schema.example: access_token=<jwt>; HttpOnly; SameSite=Lax; Secure, refresh_token=<jwt>; HttpOnly; SameSite=Strict; Secure

post.description: Revokes the current refresh token and clears both auth cookies. Requires a valid access token cookie.

200.description: User logged out. Auth cookies cleared.

Set-Cookie.description: Clears the access_token and refresh_token cookies (maxAge=0).

401.description: Access or refresh token not found

post.description: Issues a new access token and refresh token using the refresh_token cookie. The old refresh token is invalidated.

200.description: Tokens refreshed successfully. New cookies set.

Set-Cookie.description: Sets new access_token and refresh_token HttpOnly cookies.

401.description: Refresh token missing, invalid or revoked

post.description: Initiates the password reset flow. If the email exists, a reset link is sent. Always returns 200 to avoid email enumeration.

200.description: Request processed. An email is sent if the address exists.

example.message: If the address exists, an email with instructions has been sent

post.description: Resets the user password using a single-use token received by email. The token is passed as a path parameter.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Single-use reset token received via email.

401.description: Token invalid, expired or already used

get.description: Returns the full private profile of the currently authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's email address. Requires current password confirmation. On success, auth cookies are cleared and the user must log in again.

Set-Cookie.description: Clears the access_token and refresh_token cookies.

409.description: Email already in use or same as current

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's password. Requires current password confirmation. On success, auth cookies are cleared and the user must log in again.

Set-Cookie.description: Clears the access_token and refresh_token cookies.

409.description: New password is the same as the current password

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's username. Requires current password confirmation. On success, auth cookies are cleared and the user must log in again.

Set-Cookie.description: Clears the access_token and refresh_token cookies.

409.description: Username already in use or same as current

get.description: Returns the public profile of a user. Sensitive fields (email, role, roleLevel, isVerified) are omitted.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the user to retrieve.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of games. Supports optional filtering by name and genre.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 15, max: 50).

parameters.name: genre
parameters.description: Filter by one or multiple genres.

get.description: Returns detailed information for a specific game identified by its slug.
Returns paginated assets for a specific game. The `gameSlug` parameter is required to ensure context isolation between games.

parameters.name: gameSlug
parameters.description: Slug of the game. Required to prevent cross-game results.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by macro type (weapon, armor, spell, etc.).

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by specific category (greatsword, heavy-armor, sorcery, etc.).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 15, max: 50).

get.description: Returns detailed information for a specific asset identified by its UUID.
Returns a paginated list of public builds. Supports optional filtering by game, name, tags, and creator.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 15, max: 50).

post.description: Creates a new build. The authenticated user becomes the creator. Rate limited to 10 requests per 15 minutes.

get.description: Returns full build details including game-specific template data and resolved asset list.

patch.description: Partially updates an existing build. The user must be authenticated and have editor or creator permissions on the build. Rate limited to 50 requests per 15 minutes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the build to update.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a build. Only the creator or a co-owner can delete. Rate limited to 20 requests per 15 minutes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the build to delete.

204.description: Build deleted successfully. No content returned.

get.description: Returns the list of users with permissions on the build, including their roles.

post.description: Grants a user a role on the build. The requester must be the creator or a co-owner. Rate limited to 50 requests per 15 minutes.

userId.description: UUID of the user to grant permissions to.

409.description: User already has permissions on this build

example.message: User already has permissions for this build

delete.description: Removes a user's permission from a build. The requester must be the creator or a co-owner. Rate limited to 50 requests per 15 minutes.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: UUID of the user whose permission will be revoked.

204.description: Permission revoked successfully. No content returned.
